```python
class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        prev_bit = n & 1
        n >>= 1
        while n:
            curr_bit = n & 1
            if curr_bit == prev_bit:
                return False
            prev_bit = curr_bit
            n >>= 1
        return True
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses bitwise operations to check each bit of the input number from right to left, ensuring that no two adjacent bits have the same value, thus determining if the number has alternating bits.
